omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
• When registering to the App, the User will be asked to provide his/her phone number, name, and photo, which will be used in
order to allow us to provide our Users with the App's services and experience. Such information may be provided to other
Users via the Advanced Search Functionality and Matching Functionality, as a confirmed match to such relevant User's contact
information.

For avoidance of doubt, the Company may transfer and disclose to third parties or otherwise use Non-personal Information at
its own discretion. Notwithstanding the above, as a part of our operating model, and to enable the delivery of Services, we may
also, from time to time, make repositories containing certain Personal Information searchable or usable by third party business
partners, for the purposes of their services and business operations. You hereby consent to disclosure of your Personal
Information to
them and their usage of it. This may include Personal Information that you have submitted to us in the past. As some of our
business partners may be located outside your country, you consent to the transfer of your Personal Information to this extent.
